# Generated by Codex for StemStudio Script Wizard.

# Source Map — PMNDRS Racing Game

## Source -> Generated File Mapping

| Source File | Generated File(s) | Notes |
|-------------|-------------------|-------|
| `src/App.tsx` | `pmndrs-racing-game.stemscript`, `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Scene assembly, imported assets, lighting, gate placement, overall runtime orchestration |
| `src/store.ts` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Vehicle tuning, camera modes, boost rules, timer/checkpoint state, keybind semantics |
| `src/models/vehicle/Vehicle.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Drive loop, boost drain, steering, camera sway |
| `src/models/vehicle/Chassis.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Chassis visuals, brake lights, color tinting, speedometer needle logic translated into HUD state |
| `src/models/vehicle/Wheel.tsx` | `pmndrs-racing-game.stemscript`, `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Wheel object layout, scaling, steering, and spin |
| `src/models/track/Track.tsx` | `pmndrs-racing-game.stemscript`, `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Imported track model, animated birds/clouds, water ambience |
| `src/models/track/Train.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Train world animation and ambient audio approximation |
| `src/models/track/Heightmap.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Terrain grounding intent converted into downward scene raycasts |
| `src/models/Goal.ts` | `pmndrs-racing-game.stemscript`, `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Start/checkpoint/finish gate volumes |
| `src/models/BoundingBox.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | World reset fallback |
| `src/effects/Boost.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Boost state drives camera shake and HUD status, but the mesh streak effect is omitted |
| `src/effects/Dust.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Approximated through HUD/audio only in the first pass |
| `src/effects/Skid.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Drift/brake feel feeds audio and steering response; skid decals are omitted |
| `src/effects/audio/*.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Vehicle audio loops and one-shots |
| `src/ui/*.tsx` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | UIKit intro, HUD, help, local leaderboard, finish overlay, checkpoint feedback |
| `src/data.ts` | `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml`, `conversion-notes.md` | Supabase auth/leaderboard replaced by local in-memory leaderboard |

## Important Entrypoints

| Entrypoint | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `pmndrs-racing-game.stemscript` | Main StemStudio import/setup script |
| `behaviors/prgRaceGame.yaml` | Single custom manager behavior for driving, UI, audio, and world animation |

## Mechanics Map

| Mechanic | Source Implementation | Stem Implementation |
|----------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| Vehicle motion | Cannon raycast vehicle | Deterministic custom behavior with source-tuned speed and steer curves |
| Camera switching | Zustand camera enum + R3F camera components | Custom `DefaultCamera` states cycled by keyboard |
| Gate timing | Physics trigger boxes | Scene-authored gate objects checked by oriented-box tests |
| HUD | React DOM | UIKit fullscreen overlay |
| Auth leaderboard | Supabase | Local session leaderboard |
| Train animation | GLTF clip playback | Runtime positional approximation |
| Minimap | FBO + sprites | Omitted in first pass |

## Asset Map

| Asset | Source Path | Destination Path | Provenance |
|-------|-------------|------------------|------------|
| Track model | `public/models/track-draco.glb` | `models/track-draco.glb` | Direct copy |
| Chassis model | `public/models/chassis-draco.glb` | `models/chassis-draco.glb` | Direct copy |
| Wheel model | `public/models/wheel-draco.glb` | `models/wheel-draco.glb` | Direct copy |
| Engine loop | `public/sounds/engine.mp3` | `audio/engine.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Acceleration loop | `public/sounds/accelerate.mp3` | `audio/accelerate.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Boost loop | `public/sounds/boost.mp3` | `audio/boost.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Honk | `public/sounds/honk.mp3` | `audio/honk.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Crash | `public/sounds/crash.mp3` | `audio/crash.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Train ambience | `public/sounds/train.mp3` | `audio/train.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Water ambience | `public/sounds/water.mp3` | `audio/water.mp3` | Direct copy |
| Brake/skid loop | `public/sounds/tire-brake.mp3` | `audio/tire-brake.mp3` | Direct copy |
